Dolphins at daybreak / by Mary Pope Osborne; illustrated by Sal Murdocca. p. cm. — (Magic tree house series : #9) “A first stepping stone book.” SUMMARY: Their magic tree house takes Jack and Annie deep into the sea, where they meet up with dolphins, sharks, and octopi as they search for the answer to an ancient riddle. eISBN: 978-0-375-89426-8 [1.
